title: Redirect Revalidation, DNS, Address Classes, Proxies, and SSRF · Retrieval Circuit

Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for connection-time SSRF defense record after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case prac…
objectives: Allowlist schemes and ports, reject embedded credentials, and prohibit non-HTTP destinations before resolution.
Classify all IPv4 and IPv6 answers including mapped, loopback, private, link-local, multicast, unspecified, and metadata ranges.
Resolve every Location and reapply authorization, scope, credential, method, DNS, loop, and budget rules per hop.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

stimulus.title: Proxy Egress Policy case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: A review TypeScript team handles case 3070 during an authorized municipal service audit. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to block unsafe schemes, addresses, redirects, rebinding, proxies, and metadata while retaining causal evidence; release evidence binds source, compiler, emitted JavaScript, lockfile, package, browser revision, container, configuration, and restored state; then change one duplicate, accessibility state, axe result, resource budget, browser readiness, or manual-review condition without overclaiming. Browser TypeScript uses pure bounded models and original URL, robots, sitemap, HTTP, HTML, frontier, accessibility, browser, and report fixtures only. Real DNS, Fetch, streams, Cheerio, Playwright, axe-core, files, processes, packages, containers, assistive-technology review, load, legal review, restore, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Make proxy inheritance, bypass rules, egress allowlists, metadata blocks, and connection evidence explicit.

lines.label: risk
lines.text: Application URL validation alone controls all outbound destinations.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Make proxy inheritance, bypass rules, egress allowlists, metadata blocks, and connection evidence explicit. Artifact under review: connection-time SSRF defense record.

options.text: The record names the assumption, applies Proxy Egress Policy, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.

The Proxy Egress Policy record says connection-time SSRF defense record looks right but supplies no governing condition, observation, changed case, or counterexample. That claim fails the separate evidence from confidence evidence boundary for Proxy Egress Policy.

For separate evidence from confidence, fetch one convenient page, omit owner authorization, source and emitted revision, URL and robots policy, runtime admission, stream and Promise ownership, Cheerio and browser differences, accessibility states, changed fixtures, recovery, and controlled Node transfer, then accept plausible objects as TypeScript crawler proof. This does not satisfy Proxy Egress Policy for connection-time SSRF defense record.

steps.title: Authorized site auditing and TypeScript Record what required effort · Review Proxy Egress Policy
steps.instruction:
Write the review evidence note for Proxy Egress Policy: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A review TypeScript team handles case 4689 during an isolated browser, package, and restore smoke. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to block unsafe schemes, addresses, redirects, rebinding, proxies, and metadata while retaining causal evidence; browser TypeScript remains deterministic and free of Node, network, filesystem, browser, and host effects; then reorder one frontier, p-limit, Promise, AbortSignal, stream, retry, checkpoint, or shutdown event and prove ownership. Browser TypeScript uses pure bounded models and original URL, robots, sitemap, HTTP, HTML, frontier, accessibility, browser, and report fixtures only. Real DNS, Fetch, streams, Cheerio, Playwright, axe-core, files, processes, packages, containers, assistive-technology review, load, legal review, restore, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Make proxy inheritance, bypass rules, egress allowlists, metadata blocks, and connection evidence explicit.

Evidence target: Authorized site auditing and TypeScript Record what required effort · Review Proxy Egress Policy.
steps.why: Retrieving Proxy Egress Policy through the concrete connection-time SSRF defense record case exposes causal gaps that recognition alone can hide. content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Make proxy inheritance, bypass rules, egress allowlists, metadata blocks, and connection evidence explicit.
